{{ isEditMode ? 'Edit Grade' : 'Add Grade' }}
Grade Code @if (gradeForm.get('GradeCode')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('GradeCode')?.touched) { Grade Code is required }
Created Date
Active Authorized Discarded

Grade Details

Grade Name @if (gradeForm.get('GradeName')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('GradeName')?.touched) { Grade Name is required }
Grade Level Select Grade Level @for (level of gradeLevelList; track level.value) { {{ level.label }} } @if (gradeForm.get('GradeLevel')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('GradeLevel')?.touched) { Grade Level is required }
Grade Description @if (gradeForm.get('GradeDescription')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('GradeDescription')?.touched) { Grade Description is required }

Salary Information

Minimum Salary (CTC) @if (gradeForm.get('MinSalCTC')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('MinSalCTC')?.touched) { Minimum Salary is required }
Maximum Salary (CTC) @if (gradeForm.get('MaxSalCTC')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('MaxSalCTC')?.touched) { Maximum Salary is required } @if (gradeForm.hasError('salaryRangeInvalid')) { Maximum salary must be greater than minimum salary }
Currency Select currency @for (currency of filteredCurrencyList; track currency.CurrencyId) { {{ currency.CurrencyName }} } @if (gradeForm.get('GradeCurrencyId')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('GradeCurrencyId')?.touched) { Currency is required }

Employment Terms

Leave Entitlement (Annual) Number of leave days per year @if (gradeForm.get('LeaveEntitlementAnnual')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('LeaveEntitlementAnnual')?.touched) { Leave Entitlement is required }
Probation Period Duration in months @if (gradeForm.get('ProbationPeriod')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('ProbationPeriod')?.touched) { Probation Period is required }
Notice Period Duration in months @if (gradeForm.get('NoticePeriod')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('NoticePeriod')?.touched) { Notice Period is required }

Experience Requirements

Experience Required Years of experience required @if (gradeForm.get('ExperiencedRequired')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('ExperiencedRequired')?.touched) { Experience Required is required }
Experience Remarks @if (gradeForm.get('ExperiencedRemark')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('ExperiencedRemark')?.touched) { Experience Remarks is required }

Additional Information

Grade Remarks @if (gradeForm.get('GradeRemark')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('GradeRemark')?.touched) { Grade Remarks is required }

Designations

@for (designation of designations.controls; track $index; let i = $index) {
Designation {{ i + 1 }} @if (designations.length > 1) { }
Designation Code @if (designation.get('DesignationCode')?.invalid && designation.get('DesignationCode')?.touched) { Designation Code is required }
Designation Name @if (designation.get('DesignationName')?.invalid && designation.get('DesignationName')?.touched) { Designation Name is required }
Qualification Select Qualification @for (qualification of filteredQualificationList; track qualification.QualificationId) { {{ qualification.QualificationName }} } @if (designation.get('DesignationQualificationId')?.invalid && designation.get('DesignationQualificationId')?.touched) { Qualification is required }
Designation Description @if (designation.get('DesignationDescription')?.invalid && designation.get('DesignationDescription')?.touched) { Designation Description is required }
Qualification Remarks @if (designation.get('GradeQualificationRemark')?.invalid && designation.get('GradeQualificationRemark')?.touched) { Qualification Remarks is required }
Required Skills @if (designation.get('RequiredSkills')?.invalid && designation.get('RequiredSkills')?.touched) { Required Skills is required }
Designation Remarks @if (designation.get('DesignationRemark')?.invalid && designation.get('DesignationRemark')?.touched) { Designation Remarks is required }
}

Facility Assignment

Select the facilities that this grade will have access to:

@for (facility of facilityList; track facility.FacilityId) { {{ facility.FacilityName }} }
Selected Facilities: {{ selectedFacilities.length }}
@if (selectedFacilities.length === 0) {

No facilities selected

} @else { @for (facilityId of selectedFacilities; track facilityId) { {{ getFacilityName(facilityId) }} } }

CTC Structure Configuration

Basic Salary Components

Basic Salary Basic salary component @if (gradeForm.get('CTCMasterBasic')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('CTCMasterBasic')?.touched) { Basic Salary is required }
Dearness Allowance (DA) Dearness allowance component @if (gradeForm.get('CTCMasterDA')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('CTCMasterDA')?.touched) { DA is required }
House Rent Allowance (HRA) House rent allowance component @if (gradeForm.get('CTCMasterHRA')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('CTCMasterHRA')?.touched) { HRA is required }

Allowances

Conveyance Allowance Conveyance allowance
City Compensatory Allowance City compensatory allowance
Leave Travel Allowance (LTA) Leave travel allowance
Car Allowance Car allowance
Fuel Allowance Fuel allowance
Driver Allowance Driver allowance
Miscellaneous Allowance Miscellaneous allowance
Gross Salary Auto-calculated gross salary

Employee Deductions

PF Employee Contribution Employee PF contribution @if (gradeForm.get('CTCMasterPFEmployee')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('CTCMasterPFEmployee')?.touched) { PF Employee Contribution is required }
Professional Tax (PT) Professional tax deduction @if (gradeForm.get('CTCMasterPT')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('CTCMasterPT')?.touched) { Professional Tax is required }
ESIC Employee Contribution Employee ESIC contribution @if (gradeForm.get('CTCMasterEsic')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('CTCMasterEsic')?.touched) { ESIC is required }

Employer Contributions

PF Employer Contribution Employer PF contribution @if (gradeForm.get('CTCMasterPFEmployer')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('CTCMasterPFEmployer')?.touched) { PF Employer Contribution is required }
Medical Insurance Medical insurance premium @if (gradeForm.get('CTCMasterMedicalInsurance')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('CTCMasterMedicalInsurance')?.touched) { Medical Insurance is required }
Gratuity Gratuity provision @if (gradeForm.get('CTCMasterGraduity')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('CTCMasterGraduity')?.touched) { Gratuity is required }
Performance KPA Performance KPA component @if (gradeForm.get('CTCMasterPerformanceKPA')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('CTCMasterPerformanceKPA')?.touched) { Performance KPA is required }
Bonus Annual bonus component @if (gradeForm.get('CTCMasterBonus')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('CTCMasterBonus')?.touched) { Bonus is required }
MLWF (Labour Welfare Fund) Labour welfare fund contribution @if (gradeForm.get('CTCMasterMLWF')?.invalid && gradeForm.get('CTCMasterMLWF')?.touched) { MLWF is required }
@if (!isEditMode) { }
